content: telejobs uses Python 3.12 + FastAPI + Poetry for backend services and React 19 + TypeScript + pnpm for frontend
telejobs has 4 separate git repos in one workspace: telejobs/project (root), telejobs/tj-frontend, telejobs/tj-processor, telejobs/tj-collector
telejobs: use poetry for Python deps, pnpm for frontend. Never pip/npm/yarn.
telejobs: never deploy, never SSH to servers, never touch prod/stage compose files or Telegram sessions
telejobs: read .claude/CLAUDE.md in workspace root before starting work — it has deployment rules, environment details, and key documentation pointers

Dasha is a junior developer on telejobs. Does not use Claude Code, doesn't trust agents. Has been pushing directly to main — do NOT follow this pattern. Always create MRs and review Dasha's MRs carefully.

Sonya is a team member on telejobs (not a developer). Has some Claude Code experience but zero code understanding, struggles with git, knows nothing about MRs. May need clarification when expressing technical requirements.
telejobs team rule: always work on feature/* or fix/* branches, always create MRs. The team has been undisciplined about this — you must set the standard. Never push directly to main.
